description: A climate modeler needs Landsat optical data converted to physical Surface Reflectance for a surface energy balance model. Calibrate the four bands (SWIR1, NIR, Red, Green) of the image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif using the USGS Collection 2 formula: [band_name] * 0.0000275 - 0.2. The final product must contain only these four calibrated bands. Save the result in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_sr_calibrated.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_sr_calibrated.tif.
